title: Cremiry modpack
description: This modpack is designed for the Russian server "Cremiry" but is also suitable for other private vanilla servers
body:
**This modpack is designed for the Russian server "Cremiry" but is also suitable for other private vanilla servers.**

Our modpack contains optimization mods, visual enhancements, features for YouTubers and builders such as replay mod and litematica, as well as shaders and texture packs.
